title: AMAS Memory Object
description: The fundamental unit of authority in AMAS. See SPEC.md Section 4.

content.description: The substantive content of the memory

mutable.description: Whether this object can be modified after creation

inference_marker.description: True if this is Tier 3 inferred content. MUST be true when authority_tier=3.

confidence.description: Confidence level. Not a calibrated probability unless documented as such.

expires_at.description: Expiration time after which the object loses authority

escalated_from.description: Original tier if this object was promoted via authority escalation

escalated_by.description: Identity of the agent who performed the escalation

supersedes.description: object_id of the Memory Object this replaces (Rule 2 explicit supersession)

chain.description: Ordered list of source versions or delegation steps

authn_context.description: Authentication context for verifying escalation authority
